name: Nakatomi CRM
description: A headless, agent-native CRM. Stores contacts, companies, deals, activities, notes, tasks, files, relationships, and timeline events. Supports multi-tenant workspaces, API keys, webhooks, bulk upsert, soft delete, idempotency, and a pluggable memory-connector layer for cross-linking with external memory systems (DocDeploy, Supermemory, and others).

authentication.notes: Use a workspace API key (prefix 'nk_') from POST /workspace/api-keys. Alternatively, a user JWT from POST /auth/login with an X-Workspace header.

capabilities.name: contacts
capabilities.description: CRUD + bulk upsert + substring search over people records.

capabilities.name: companies
capabilities.description: CRUD + bulk upsert + substring search over organization records.

capabilities.name: deals
capabilities.description: Pipeline deals with status (open/won/lost), stages, amounts, and ownership.

capabilities.name: activities
capabilities.description: Calls, meetings, email logs, and other timestamped touchpoints attached to any entity.

capabilities.name: notes
capabilities.description: Markdown notes attached to any entity.

capabilities.name: tasks
capabilities.description: Assignable tasks with due dates, attached to any entity.

capabilities.name: files
capabilities.description: File uploads attached to any entity. Storage: local volume or S3-compatible.

capabilities.name: relationships
capabilities.description: Typed directed edges between any two entities. Supports BFS neighbor queries up to depth 2.

capabilities.name: timeline
capabilities.description: Append-only event feed per entity and per workspace.

capabilities.name: webhooks
capabilities.description: HMAC-signed webhook subscriptions. Retry with exponential backoff; delivery log is queryable.

capabilities.name: memory
capabilities.description: Cross-link CRM entities with external memory systems (DocDeploy, Supermemory, …). Fan-out recall, bidirectional trace.

capabilities.name: ingest
capabilities.description: Accept CSV, vCard, JSON, or text; normalize and materialize into CRM entities.

safety.pii_handling: stored in operator's database; not transmitted to third parties unless memory connectors are explicitly configured
safety.rate_limits: not enforced at the API layer in v0.x
